codeReview.summary: Implementation satisfies the feature intent. The commit updates ci-gate-worker guidance to explicitly require same-SHA remote check-run evidence with immutable run IDs/URLs and required-context cross-validation mapping fields before final confidence evidence is marked complete. The change is procedural guidance only and does not alter runtime CI wiring.

summary: Pass: feature requirements are met, transcript skeleton and diff align with the requested guidance hardening, and no blocking quality issues were identified.
